lyrics.text: Oh baby 聽我說
lyrics.romanization: Oh baby tīng wǒ shuō
lyrics.translate: Oh baby, listen to me

lyrics.text: 遇見妳讓我再一次怦然心動
lyrics.romanization: Yùjiàn nǐ ràng wǒ zài yīcì pēngrán xīndòng
lyrics.translate: Meeting you makes my heart flutter all over again

lyrics.text: You and me 是一場夢 Ya
lyrics.romanization: You and me shì yī chǎng mèng Ya
lyrics.translate: You and me, it's just a dream, yeah

lyrics.text: 妳說妳愛我 最後妳卻跟他走
lyrics.romanization: Nǐ shuō nǐ ài wǒ, zuìhòu nǐ què gēn tā zǒu
lyrics.translate: You said you loved me, but in the end, you walked away with him

lyrics.text: 想妳的時候要學會放手
lyrics.romanization: Xiǎng nǐ de shíhòu yào xuéhuì fàngshǒu
lyrics.translate: When I miss you, I have to learn to let go

lyrics.text: 已讀不回絕對不是妳的錯
lyrics.romanization: Yǐ dú bù huí juéduì bùshì nǐ de cuò
lyrics.translate: Leaving me on read is definitely not your fault

lyrics.text: Oh baby 想妳的晚上 窗外下的雨滴
lyrics.romanization: Oh baby xiǎng nǐ de wǎnshàng, chuāngwài xià de yǔdī
lyrics.translate: Oh baby, on the nights I miss you, raindrops fall outside my window

lyrics.text: 在迷濛的夜裡想起都是妳
lyrics.romanization: Zài míméng de yèlǐ xiǎngqǐ dōu shì nǐ
lyrics.translate: In the hazy night, you're all I think about

lyrics.text: 每次想起妳只能裝不在意
lyrics.romanization: Měi cì xiǎngqǐ nǐ zhǐ néng zhuāng bù zàiyì
lyrics.translate: Every time I think of you, I can only pretend not to care

lyrics.text: 該要怎麼證明 我愛妳 我愛妳 就只能愛妳
lyrics.romanization: Gāi yào zěnme zhèngmíng, wǒ ài nǐ, wǒ ài nǐ, jiù zhǐ néng ài nǐ
lyrics.translate: How can I prove it? I love you, I love you, I can only love you

lyrics.text: 我打開手機早已失去妳的 失去妳的蹤影
lyrics.romanization: Wǒ dǎkāi shǒujī zǎoyǐ shīqù nǐ de, shīqù nǐ de zōngyǐng
lyrics.translate: I check my phone, but I've long lost... lost all trace of you

lyrics.text: 想妳的時候 妳拉著我的手 卻突然說分手
lyrics.romanization: Xiǎng nǐ de shíhòu, nǐ lāzhe wǒ de shǒu, què tūrán shuō fēnshǒu
lyrics.translate: When I missed you, you held my hand, then suddenly asked to break up

lyrics.text: 我emo一整夜只因為想妳
lyrics.romanization: Wǒ emo yī zhěng yè zhǐ yīnwèi xiǎng nǐ
lyrics.translate: I stay up feeling emo all night just because I miss you

lyrics.text: 在那些歌裡唱起的他都是妳
lyrics.romanization: Zài nàxiē gē lǐ chàng qǐ de tā dōu shì nǐ
lyrics.translate: Every song I sing is all about you

lyrics.text: 我們終究只是朋友的關係
lyrics.romanization: Wǒmen zhōngjiù zhǐshì péngyǒu de guānxì
lyrics.translate: In the end, we're nothing more than just friends

lyrics.text: 可我不能沒有妳
lyrics.romanization: Kě wǒ bùnéng méiyǒu nǐ
lyrics.translate: But I can't live without you

lyrics.text: 就這樣消失在妳眼裡
lyrics.romanization: Jiù zhèyàng xiāoshī zài nǐ yǎnlǐ
lyrics.translate: Just fading away from your sight like this

lyrics.text: 請原諒我 我的不告而別
lyrics.romanization: Qǐng yuánliàng wǒ, wǒ de bù gào ér bié
lyrics.translate: Please forgive me for leaving without a word

lyrics.text: 還是走不到妳心裡
lyrics.romanization: Háishì zǒu bù dào nǐ xīnlǐ
lyrics.translate: I still couldn't find my way into your heart

lyrics.text: 付出所有只得到回憶
lyrics.romanization: Fùchū suǒyǒu zhǐ dédào huíyì
lyrics.translate: Giving my all, only to be left with memories

lyrics.text: Ya 別在意 別懷疑 別哭泣 別生氣
lyrics.romanization: Ya bié zàiyì, bié huáiyí, bié kūqì, bié shēngqì
lyrics.translate: Yeah, don't mind it, don't doubt it, don't cry, don't be mad

lyrics.text: 告訴自己我不能夠太想妳
lyrics.romanization: Gàosù zìjǐ wǒ bù nénggòu tài xiǎng nǐ
lyrics.translate: Telling myself I shouldn't miss you too much

lyrics.text: 不喜歡這種感覺 失去妳那種感覺
lyrics.romanization: Bù xǐhuān zhè zhǒng gǎnjué, shīqù nǐ nà zhǒng gǎnjué
lyrics.translate: I hate this feeling, the feeling of losing you

lyrics.text: 妳顛倒了我日夜 有誰能給我慰藉
lyrics.romanization: Nǐ diāndǎole wǒ rìyè, yǒu shuí néng gěi wǒ wèijiè
lyrics.translate: You've turned my days and nights upside down, who can give me comfort now?

lyrics.text: 我該怎麼辦 我該怎麼辦
lyrics.romanization: Wǒ gāi zěnme bàn, wǒ gāi zěnme bàn
lyrics.translate: What should I do? What should I do?

lyrics.text: 一想到這些煩心事我就心煩
lyrics.romanization: Yī xiǎngdào zhèxiē fánxīn shì wǒ jiù xīnfán
lyrics.translate: Just thinking about this mess makes me so frustrated

lyrics.text: 我的世界不能沒有妳 我想我會完蛋
lyrics.romanization: Wǒ de shìjiè bùnéng méiyǒu nǐ, wǒ xiǎng wǒ huì wándàn
lyrics.translate: My world can't go on without you, I think I'm going to fall apart

lyrics.text: 多希望我們的時間能夠放慢
lyrics.romanization: Duō xīwàng wǒmen de shíjiān nénggòu fàng màn
lyrics.translate: How I wish our time together could slow down

lyrics.text: 在迷濛的夜裡想起都是妳
lyrics.romanization: Zài míméng de yèlǐ xiǎngqǐ dōu shì nǐ
lyrics.translate: In the hazy night, you're all I think about

lyrics.romanization: Měi cì xiǎngqǐ nǐ zhǐ néng zhuāng bù zàiyì
lyrics.translate: Every time I think of you, I can only pretend not to care

lyrics.romanization: Gāi yào zěnme zhèngmíng, wǒ ài nǐ, wǒ ài nǐ, jiù zhǐ néng ài nǐ
lyrics.translate: How can I prove it? I love you, I love you, I can only love you

lyrics.romanization: Wǒ dǎkāi shǒujī zǎoyǐ shīqù nǐ de, shīqù nǐ de zōngyǐng
